message:
fix: Learn dropdown blinks open and immediately closes (#5249)

The `useModalState` hook returned `open`, `close`, and `toggle` as plain
arrow functions — new references on every render. In `LearnDropdown`, the
route-change effect `useEffect(() => { close() }, [location.pathname, close])`
treated every re-render as a dependency change and called `close()`
immediately after `toggle()` opened the dropdown.

Wrap all three callbacks with `useCallback` so their references are
stable across renders. This also fixes any other component using
`useModalState` with the callback in an effect dependency array.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
